raw_consumer_statement:
I was informed of credit fraud on XX/XX/XXXX with my Home Depot credit card. I called and refuted the charge which went into investigation. The result of the investigation dated XX/XX/XXXX was that my claim is denied and I will be responsible for the charges. I since filed a police report on XX/XX/XXXX and called the store for an image of the receipt to verify that the signature was not my own. The store will not release to be, but did indicate they would cooperate with the police. 

On XX/XX/XXXX a businesses credit card was opened under a fake business name and my legal name and address. This card was closed on XX/XX/XXXX without any apparent charges. 


A second fraudulent business credit card was opened under my name ( unclear of date ) this card was used and I have received a bill which I also refuted. That investigation was started by the business on XX/XX/XXXX and currently in review.
